title: Long-Term Memory Update Flow
activity_flow: START: Agent determines current task contains important long-term info
Agent calls do_start_long_term_update(args, response)
do_start_long_term_update → get_global_memory(): reads memory/global_mem_insight.txt + assets/insight_fixed_structure.txt → returns formatted memory prompt
do_start_long_term_update → file_read('./memory/memory_management_sop.md', show_linenos=False): reads memory update SOP
[DECISION] Does memory_management_sop.md exist?
YES → returns SOP content as StepOutcome result
NO  → returns 'Memory Management SOP not found. Do not update memory.' → SKIP all updates → END
Agent receives SOP + memory prompt, begins classification pass
[DECISION] Classify extracted info type:
→ L2 (Environment facts: paths / credentials / config) → target file: memory/global_mem_insight.txt
→ L3 (Complex task experience: pitfalls / prerequisites / key steps) → target file: relevant SOP file under memory/
Agent calls do_file_read(path=<target_file>): reads current content of target memory file
do_file_read → file_read(path, start, keyword, count, show_linenos): reads file, logs access via log_memory_access(path)
[DECISION] Is there genuinely new content not already in the file?
NO (no new value) → skip update → END
YES → proceed to patch
Agent calls do_file_patch(path=<target_file>, old_content=<existing_block>, new_content=<updated_block>)
do_file_patch → expand_file_refs(new_content): resolves any {{file:...}} references in new content
do_file_patch → file_patch(path, old_content, new_content): locates unique old_content block in file, replaces with new_content
[DECISION] file_patch result:
old_content not found (count=0) → returns error 'not found', agent must re-read and retry
old_content not unique (count>1) → returns error 'ambiguous match', agent must provide longer context block
success → file updated with minimal local change
[OPTIONAL] Agent calls do_update_working_checkpoint(key_info, related_sop): updates in-memory working state (self.working['key_info'], self.working['related_sop'], resets passed_sessions=0)
END: Memory updated (or skipped)
key_conditions: SOP file existence check → gate for entire flow
Info classification: L2 (env facts) vs L3 (SOP/experience)
New value check: only patch if content is genuinely new (not already stored)
Uniqueness check in file_patch: old_content must match exactly once
file_patch not-found guard: forces agent to re-read before retrying

method_signatures.do_start_long_term_update: def do_start_long_term_update(self, args, response) → StepOutcome(sop_content, next_prompt=memory_update_instructions)
method_signatures.do_file_read: def do_file_read(self, args, response) → StepOutcome(file_content)  [args: path, start, count, keyword, show_linenos]
method_signatures.file_read: def file_read(path, start=1, keyword=None, count=200, show_linenos=True) → str
method_signatures.do_file_patch: def do_file_patch(self, args, response) → StepOutcome(result)  [args: path, old_content, new_content]
method_signatures.file_patch: def file_patch(path, old_content, new_content) → {status, msg}  [finds unique block, replaces in-place]
method_signatures.do_update_working_checkpoint: def do_update_working_checkpoint(self, args, response) → StepOutcome({result: 'working key_info updated'})  [args: key_info, related_sop]

data_stores.L1_sync: Mentioned in prompt as needing sync when L2 updated (implicit)
data_stores.L2_memory: memory/global_mem_insight.txt — env facts: paths, credentials, config
data_stores.L3_SOP: memory/<task_sop>.md — complex task experience: pitfalls, key steps
data_stores.SOP_guide: memory/memory_management_sop.md — instructions for how to update memory
data_stores.access_stats: memory/file_access_stats.json — updated by log_memory_access() on every file_read of memory files

important_notes: do_start_long_term_update is a settlement/finalization tool called at task end, not during task execution
The prompt injected into StepOutcome.next_prompt drives the LLM to classify and decide what/whether to update
file_patch enforces minimal local edits (never full overwrite); agent must never use file_write for memory
Prohibited content: temp vars, unverified info, general knowledge, easily reproducible details
turn_end_callback injects get_global_memory() every 10 turns as a background refresh mechanism
GA_LANG env var controls language suffix (_en vs '') for memory template files
